preregistration.bar: hold AND oos twin z >= HMM - 0.5 (tightened where W2 failed)
preregistration.variants: temporal GaussianHMM causal filter; + slow-pooled L1
preregistration.on_fail: DISCARD substitute; keep certified HMM; L2 = KT-B level only

verdict: DISCARD L2-AS-SUBSTITUTE (per the binding W2 guidance) — no temporal variant passes the OOS-inclusive bar: the certified HMM belief remains the rule's command surface; L2 stays as the KT-B representation level only; W3 memory work proceeds on L1 representations (never depended on the substitute). Logged honestly as the second confirmation that the month-level substitute lacks independent OOS content.

POST_REVIEW.mechanism: causal-filter OOD lock-in: 10Y-yield LEVEL at mean z +2.23 hold / +3.85 oos vs the frozen 2010-18 scaler pins the posterior (occupancy 0.98-1.0, emission logp -8 -> -14.3); no threshold rescues a pinned posterior; the CL-1c-style state-matching fix selects the SAME state
POST_REVIEW.harness_gap: the [5%,95%] coverage guard was dev-only - it admitted configs degenerate outside dev; future harnesses evaluate the guard per window
POST_REVIEW.l2_rebuild_rule: exclude raw level features (or adapt scaling) in any future L2
